programmes.show_description: (2022) Adults only drama tackling youth violence in Iceland. When charismatic, latently sensitive Addi welcomes bullied Balli into his gang, the question is why? In Icelandic/subs.
Teleshopping.
Teleshopping.
(1954) Western with Robert Mitchum and Marilyn Monroe. An ex-con and a saloon singer steer a raft through hostile territory to face a showdown with her crooked fiancé. With Rory Calhoun.
(1957) Second World War thriller. Robert Mitchum stars as the captain of a US destroyer in the North Atlantic hunting down a German U-boat and its world-weary captain, Curt Jurgens.
(1959) Comedy western with Kenneth More. An English gunsmith decides the Wild West is the best market for his wares, but little does he expect to end up sheriff of a lawless frontier town.
Alexander Skarsgard, Anya Taylor-Joy and director Robert Eggers talk about making their Viking adventure.
(1950) Classic comedy with James Stewart and Josephine Hull. A middle-aged eccentric insists his best friend is a six-foot invisible rabbit. And that's driving his sister to distraction.
(2020) Comedy-drama with Liam Neeson. An estranged father and son team up to fix up and sell an old Tuscan villa that their late wife and mother left to them.
(1993) Brian De Palma's crime thriller with Al Pacino and Sean Penn. An ex-con, fresh out of jail, flamboyantly declares his plan to go straight. But his criminal past won't let him go...
(2019) Wickedly funny comedy horror starring Samara Weaving. A bride finds herself being hunted down by her new in-laws when she's asked to observe a deadly family tradition.
(2019) Shola Amoo's semi-autobiographical coming-of-age drama follows a young boy's journey from idyllic Lincolnshire countryside to a London high-rise.
Teleshopping.
Teleshopping.
(1962) Comedy. James Stewart's plan for a peaceful vacation with his wife Maureen O'Hara doesn't quite materialise when she hires a crumbling old house and invites the whole family along.
Tom Hanks and director Paul Greengrass talk about making the tense, real-life thriller Captain Phillips.

programmes.show_name: The Bridge on the River Kwai
programmes.show_description: (1957) David Lean's Oscar-winning fact-based Second World War classic stars Alec Guinness as the driven commander of a group of POWs building a rail bridge for the Japanese.
(1985) Sci-fi adventure starring Dennis Quaid and Louis Gossett Jr. A human and his alien enemy find themselves stranded alone on a hostile planet, where they must work together to survive.
Tom Hanks and director Paul Greengrass talk about making the tense, real-life thriller Captain Phillips.
(2022) Sam Rockwell and Saoirse Ronan head a splendid ensemble for this comedy whodunnit that places a real murder among a production of Agatha Christie's The Mousetrap. With Adrien Brody.
(1992) High-stakes courtroom drama with more than a few good actors, including Jack Nicholson, Demi Moore and Tom Cruise. Can a lackadaisical naval lawyer crack a battle-hardened colonel?
(2021) Stephen Graham stars as a top chef spiralling inexorably towards destruction, as his life descends into chaos over one night's service at a fancy London restaurant.
